description: Anglican University College of Technology Phone: 0505091054 / 0322499822 Email: registrar@angutech.edu.gh Home About Us About Us Our History Governing Council Management Image Gallery Academics Programmes Academic Calender Students' Handbook Admissions How To Apply Library About Library E-Library Resources E-Library News & Articles Contact Us Careers Home About Us About Us Our History Governing Council Management Image Gallery Academics Programmes Academic Calender Students' Handbook Admissions How To Apply Library About Library E-Library Resources E-Library News & Articles Contact Us Careers About Angutech The Anglican University College of Technology is a private institution established by the Anglican Church (Ghana) to provide quality tertiary education in the fields of Health Care, General Agriculture, and Business Administration. Anglican University College of Technology is fully accredited by the Ghana Tertiary Education Commission (GTEC) and affiliated to the Kwame Nkrumah University of Science and Technology, Kumasi and the University of Cape Coast, Cape Coast. The institution has two Campuses currently, located at Nkoranza in the Bono East Region and Kumasi in the Ashanti Region.
